meta.signal_rule: |model - market| >= 2pp: green = model above market (BACK), red = market above model (LAY / back the complement)
meta.settlement_note: 90-min rows settle on the 90'+stoppage score; 'Team to Advance' rows settle ET+pens and sit in their own section
